cases.input: Help me understand why our free trial users are not converting to paid plans. About 80% drop off after day 3.
cases.context: B2C SaaS product, project management tool, 10,000 trial starts per month, 20% conversion target, no current analysis

cases.input: We need to decompose the procurement transformation outlined in our strategy document. The goal is to identify process gaps and automation opportunities.
cases.context: Consulting engagement, procurement transformation, 3 regions, existing ERP systems, SOW scoping required

cases.input: Our finance team manually reconciles 500 invoices per day by comparing PDFs against ERP records. Categorize this initiative.
cases.context: Manual process, repetitive cognitive task, structured data (PDFs and ERP), AI/automation candidate assessment needed

cases.input: Customer support tickets have tripled in the last quarter. Help us figure out why and what to address.
cases.context: SaaS product, 3x ticket volume, recent product update 2 months ago, no root cause analysis done, multiple hypotheses

cases.input: We need to build a customer dashboard with real-time analytics, drag-and-drop widgets, and AI-powered insights.
cases.context: User has described a solution, not a problem statement, PM should reframe to understand the underlying business problem
